AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Carto is a Shopify-powered e-commerce application that helps users shop using natural language. Users can search products, browse collections, view product details, manage their shopping cart, add or remove wishlist items, update cart quantities, apply discount codes, review their orders, and complete checkout. The app also provides personalized product recommendations, supports multiple currencies, and allows users to manage their shopping experience through conversational requests.
